headline: Start with the revenue path that fits your situation
subheadline: Use this page as the close of the funnel for buyers who want help selecting the right implementation and growth path.

sections.title: Best for self-serve buyers
sections.description: If you already know you want the product, move into Operator OS and begin with the pricing page.

sections.title: Best for buyers who need implementation
sections.description: If you want help with positioning, pages, automations, or operational setup, Launch Sprint is the strongest first conversation.

sections.title: Best for enterprise buyers
sections.description: If you need self-hosting, governance, or a customized rollout, the enterprise path should be the center of the discussion.

faq.question: What should happen on this page later?
faq.answer: This should eventually connect to a real contact form, calendar booking flow, or lead-routing system. For now it acts as a directional close page in the funnel.

cta.heading: Use this page to route people into the right next step.
cta.body: Pair it with email capture, booking, or CRM workflows once the backend sales flow is ready.
